creator: tonidasbabes88@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 250104
Patch to update monero-cli from 0.18.3.1 to 0.18.3.3

Hi,

I'd like to contribute a patch to update monero-cli to version 0.18.3.3.

The port builds successfully on a 14.0p6 system, and I have it running normally on another 14.0p6 system.

Changelog: https://github.com/monero-project/monero/releases/tag/v0.18.3.3
